_metadata.description: Zelle has NO standardised network-level reversal for COMPLETED payments. This file documents: (1) cancellation while PENDING, and (2) the out-of-band dispute/return process.
_metadata.critical_note: COMPLETED Zelle payments are FINAL and IRREVOCABLE at the network level. Zelle does not support pacs.004-style returns. This is one of the most significant operational differences from FedNow and RTP.

options_for_recovery.OPTION_1_CANCEL_PENDING: If payment is still PENDING (recipient not enrolled), cancel before expiry
options_for_recovery.OPTION_2_REQUEST_RETURN: If COMPLETED, ask recipient to voluntarily send money back (new Zelle payment from them to you)
options_for_recovery.OPTION_3_BANK_DISPUTE: File a fraud/error claim with sending bank — handled outside Zelle via Reg E, NACHA, or bank policy
options_for_recovery.OPTION_4_CHARGEBACK: Not applicable — Zelle is not a card network; no chargeback rights

_metadata.fraud_implications: Because COMPLETED Zelle payments cannot be reversed, they are a preferred vector for social engineering fraud (e.g., fake Zelle fraud alerts). Banks must rely on pre-payment fraud screening.

cancellation_request._description: Cancel a PENDING payment before the recipient enrolls

_request_body.cancellationNote: Customer wishes to cancel pending payment before recipient enrolls.

payments.refundNote: Payment was in PENDING state — sender's account was not debited. No refund action required.

cancellation_response_too_late._note: Attempt to cancel an already COMPLETED payment

error.errorDescription: Payment ZEL20250315JPMC000078901 is in COMPLETED status and cannot be cancelled. Zelle does not support reversal of completed payments.
error.suggestedAction: Contact the recipient directly to request a voluntary return payment, or file a dispute with your bank if fraud is suspected.

voluntary_return_request._description: The only network-level 'return' for a completed Zelle payment is a NEW payment in the opposite direction — the recipient sends money back
voluntary_return_request._note: There is no API call to request this from the network — it must be coordinated bilaterally between parties

payments.memo: Return of E2E-ZELLE-20250315-0001 — sent in error

bank_dispute_payload._description: Internal bank dispute/fraud claim filed against a completed Zelle payment
bank_dispute_payload._note: This is a bank-internal construct, not a Zelle network message. Format varies by bank.

claim.claimDescription: Customer states she did not authorise this payment. Her device was stolen and used to initiate the transfer.

cancellation.note: Cannot cancel COMPLETED payments via any Zelle API

completed_payment_return_options.mechanism: Recipient initiates a new Zelle payment back to sender
Sender files unauthorized transfer claim with their bank
completed_payment_return_options.timeline: 10 business days for provisional credit; 45 days for resolution
completed_payment_return_options.applicable_when: Sender's account was accessed without authorization

completed_payment_return_options.note: Zelle is not a card network — no chargeback rights
